page: Microsoft Azure B8s_v2 is a burstable virtual machine belonging to the Bsv2 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, featuring an x86_64 architecture with 4 physical cores and 8 vCPUs via hyperthreading. The system is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It utilizes the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, though it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data positions the B8s_v2 in the average performance tier across most metrics. It achieves a single-core stress-ng score of 1898.29 and a multi-core score of 7759.33. Memory bandwidth is measured at 419.35 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 55.96 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. While single-threaded bzip3 decompression reaches 10.3 GB/sec, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression drops to a weak tier at 31.92 GB/sec. The system handles 8.02 million Redis SET operations per second and delivers a static web serving throughput of 11.93 GB/sec.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation model, the B8s_v2 offers a cost-effective profile for workloads with variable CPU utilization. The lack of local storage requires external disk attachment, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This server type is suited for workloads such as static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and small-scale LLM inference, where continuous maximum CPU performance is not required.
description: Microsoft Azure B8s_v2 is an x86_64 burstable virtual machine from the Bsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 4 physical cores, 8 vCPUs, and a 2.8 GHz clock speed, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory. The instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable. Performance benchmarks generally fall into the average tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 6114.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 11380.71. However, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is relatively weak at 31.92 GB/sec. This burstable resource model provides qualitative cost efficiency for non-continuous workloads. It is suited for general-purpose tasks, static web serving, database operations, and software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure B8s_v2 is a burstable virtual machine featuring 8 vCPUs, an Intel Xeon 8370C processor, and 32.0 GB of RAM, delivering average benchmark performance for variable workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure B8s_v2 is a burstable virtual machine with an Intel Xeon 8370C CPU, 8 vCPUs, and 32.0 GB of RAM, running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A burstable x86_64 virtual machine with eight vCPUs and thirty-two gigabytes of memory for variable general-purpose workloads.
